transcription_notes: Transcribed from the UCT 2027 Undergraduate Prospectus faculty admission tables (Commerce p27-30, Engineering p36-38, Health p43-45, Humanities p55-58, Law p62, Science p65-70). The five general degrees (BSc, BCom, BBusSc, BA, BSocSc) are split into one row per specialisation/major named '<Degree>: <major>' (UJ-style), each carrying the parent degree's admission requirements plus a structured `combination` object (majors_min/max, co_majors, excludes, rule). UCT admits to the degree (majors are open and combine), so these rows share one admission standard; combination metadata is descriptive and never gates matching. scoring_method = uct_fps (percentage-sum APS/600; Science doubles Maths + Physical Sciences /800; Health adds NBT /900 — gated here on the sub-minimum APS as NBT isn't captured). min_aps = Band A 'guaranteed admission' FPS. WPS (redress) and NBT levels are non-computable and noted. Humanities diplomas/certificates and Health higher-certificate/advanced-diploma deferred. UCT publishes no programme codes here so qualification_code is null. Technical Mathematics/Technical Science are NOT accepted substitutes for Mathematics/Physical Sciences.

programmes.name: Bachelor of Commerce: Financial Accounting (General)
programmes.notes: Specialisation stream within the degree (a fixed curriculum, not a free major combination). All applicants must write the NBT (Academic & Quantitative Literacy). min_aps is the Band A 'guaranteed admission' FPS; applicants below it may still receive offers via the weighted WPS (redress) or EDU bands.

programmes.name: Bachelor of Medicine & Bachelor of Surgery (MBChB)
programmes.notes: Also requires 70% for the next three best subjects (excl LO). Selection uses a Composite Index (FPS out of 900 = APS + NBT). NBT not captured here, so this gates on the documented sub-minimum APS; actual selection is highly competitive by FPS/WPS band.

programmes.notes: Audition, interview and music theory test required (leading indicator). NSC Music 60% or Unisa Theory Gr V / Practical Gr VII. NBT Academic Literacy required (Quantitative Literacy for quantitative majors).

programmes.name: Bachelor of Laws (LLB)
programmes.notes: Undergraduate 4-year LLB. NBT AL Proficient and QL Intermediate+ required. International applicants: FPS 510+. min_aps is the Band A 'guaranteed admission' FPS; applicants below it may still receive offers via the weighted WPS (redress) or EDU bands.

programmes.name: Bachelor of Science: Applied Mathematics
programmes.notes: NBTs written for placement, not admission. FPS out of 800 (Maths + Physical Sciences doubled); min FPS 550 (Band C), 660 Band A.

combination.rule: Admitted to the Bachelor of Science; take this as a single major or with a second Science major / one approved major from another faculty.
